name: pump-basic
description: Trivial mechanical part-whole pack: a pump and its components. Exercises the component-integral roll-up rule (§14) — roller rolls up to pump through bearing, but its steel does not.

entity_types.name: Assembly
entity_types.description: A whole made of integral components.

entity_types.name: Component
entity_types.description: An integral part of an assembly.

entity_types.name: Material
entity_types.description: Stuff an object is made of.
